subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The luminous and resplendent Namiqah was a sign of devotion and supplication at the threshold of the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نمیقه غرا فریده نوراء بود و دلیل تبتل و تضرع بدرگاه کبریا
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
